en: Can you say this popular tongue twister in English?
ko: 이 유명한 영어 혀 꼬임말을 말할 수 있어? Peter Piper picked a peck of pickled peppers
ja: この有名な英語の早口言葉を言えますか？
zhTW: 你能說這個有名的英文繞口令嗎？
vi: Ban co the noi cau noi lau luoi pho bien nay bang tieng Anh khong?

en: Peter Piper picked a peck of pickled peppers.
ko: 이 유명한 영어 혀 꼬임말을 말할 수 있어? Peter Piper picked a peck of pickled peppers
ja: ピーター・パイパーはピクルスペッパーを一杯摘んだ。
zhTW: Peter Piper picked a peck of pickled peppers.
vi: Peter Piper picked a peck of pickled peppers.

en: Notice at the beginning of each of these words, there is a puff of air.
ko: 각 단어 시작에 공기가 빠져나가는 거 봐. P 소리를 연습하기 좋은 방법이야
ja: これらの単語の頭には息が吹き出ることに注目してください。
zhTW: 注意每個字的開頭都有一股氣流。
vi: Chu y rang o dau moi tu, co mot luong hoi thoat ra.

en: It's a good way to practice a P sound, puh, puh, puh.
ko: P 발음을 연습하기에 좋은 방법이야, puh, puh, puh.
ja: P音を練習するのにいい方法です、パッパッパッ。
zhTW: 這是練習P音的好方法，puh puh puh。
vi: Day la cach tot de luyen am P, puh puh puh.

en: Let's say it again and do it faster and faster and faster.
ko: puh puh puh. 다시 말하면서 점점 빨리 해보자. Peter Piper picked a
ja: もう一度言って、どんどん速くしましょう。
zhTW: 我們再說一次，越來越快。
vi: Hay noi lai va lam nhanh hon, nhanh hon, nhanh hon.

en: Peter Piper picked a peck of pickled peppers.
ko: 이 유명한 영어 혀 꼬임말을 말할 수 있어? Peter Piper picked a peck of pickled peppers
ja: ピーター・パイパーはピクルスペッパーを一杯摘んだ。
zhTW: Peter Piper picked a peck of pickled peppers.
vi: Peter Piper picked a peck of pickled peppers.

en: Peter Piper picked a peck of pickled peppers. Peter Piper picked a peck of pickled peppers.
ko: peck of pickled peppers. Peter Piper picked a peck of pickled peppers. Peter Piper picked a peck of pickled peppers. 휴 해냈어!
ja: ピーター・パイパーはピクルスペッパーを一杯摘んだ。ピーター・パイパーはピクルスペッパーを一杯摘んだ。
zhTW: Peter Piper picked a peck of pickled peppers. Peter Piper picked a peck of pickled peppers.
vi: Peter Piper picked a peck of pickled peppers. Peter Piper picked a peck of pickled peppers.

en: Whew, I did it. Subscribe for more English lessons.
ja: ふう、できた。英語レッスンをもっと見るには登録してね。
zhTW: 呼，我做到了。訂閱觀看更多英文課程。
vi: Hu, toi da lam duoc. Dang ky de xem them bai hoc tieng Anh.
